_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Heart Rate Variability is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `heart_rate_variability.rmssd` (field name assumed, and the assumption itself is the point of this fixture). base-knowledge.md documents neither Google's HRV algorithm nor its field name -- 'rmssd' records this session's out-of-band, unconfirmed belief that Fitbit/Google's HRV metric is RMSSD-based (a different statistic than HealthKit's heartRateVariabilitySDNN), not SDNN. Because that belief is unconfirmed by base-knowledge.md itself, SyncKit's TypeMapper routes this whole type to .localOnly regardless of field content -- see TypeMapper.swift's decideHeartRateVariability doc comment and progress.md's WP-11 entry. Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.heartRateVariabilityPoint().
